title: The Fed Will Send These Safe Dividends Soaring In 2024
text: We're bullish on utilities now because this economy is bogging out. We got more proof of that last week, with China posting an anemic 0.8% growth rate in Q2.

title: AEP BOARD ELECTS SLOAT CHAIR, NAMES STODDARD BOARD MEMBER
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Aug. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has elected Julie Sloat chair of the Board, effective Oct. 2. Sloat is AEP's president and chief executive officer.

title: AEP COMPLETES SALE OF UNREGULATED RENEWABLES ASSETS
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Aug. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has completed the sale of its 1,365-megawatt (MW) unregulated, contracted renewables portfolio to IRG Acquisition Holdings, a partnership owned by Invenergy, CDPQ and funds managed by Blackstone Infrastructure, at an enterprise value of $1.5 billion including project debt. AEP nets approximately $1.2 billion in cash after taxes, transaction fees and other customary adjustments.

title: American Electric Power: Lock In This Undervalued 4% Dividend Yielder
text: American Electric Power is a large electric utility in the US, serving 5.6 million customers across 11 states. AEP is aiming for 7% annual earnings growth. Despite recent declines in share price, AEP offers a 4% dividend yield and has a potential 20%+ price upside.

title: AES Q2 Earnings Fall Short of Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
text: AES' Q2 revenues of $3,027 million decline 1.7% year over year. The top line, however, beats the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 5.2%.
